description_cn: 平滑生成的肥皂膜网格。仅在局部切平面上平滑网格。与 SoapFilm 配合使用。可以用于平滑一个网格的顶点位置，但只是表面方向上的平滑，不会影响表面的正常向量。所以它能保持顶点更加均匀，但不会影响整体形状。
description_en: Smooths the generated soap film mesh. Smooths the mesh only on local tangent planes. Used in conjunction with SoapFilm. Can be used to smooth the vertex positions of a mesh, but only in the surface direction, without affecting the normal vectors of the surface. Therefore, it maintains more uniform vertices without affecting the overall shape.

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
